observation.summary: README and document-map duplicated navigation facts as manually edited reader docs.

hypothesis.summary: A single executable manifest can generate reader entrypoints and prevent broken document links.

execution.summary: Run docmap to check generated docs and publish a compact evidence JSON artifact.

evaluation.summary: The verifier rejects missing mapped docs, duplicate decision topics, and generated doc drift.

retrospective.summary: Document navigation becomes generated reader surface; the manifest owns the map.

evidence.proves: doc map reader docs and link coverage are generated from the manifest
public CI uploads document map evidence artifacts
